reasoning: The control AC-17(9) focuses on ensuring that remote access is properly managed and can be disconnected or disabled when necessary. In the context of Kubernetes, this translates to ensuring that network access to the cluster and its services is restricted and controlled. NetworkPolicies can be used to deny ingress and egress by default, ensuring that only explicitly allowed traffic is permitted. Additionally, restricting the use of LoadBalancer services and ensuring TLS is enabled for Ingress resources helps prevent unauthorized remote access.
title: Remote Access - Remote access | disconnect or disable access nist sp 800-53, r ev
